execution_summary.name: Summary
execution_summary.description: Top-level test execution report from S3 test artifacts

title.name: Title
title.description: Human-readable summary line: system under test, execution name, total case count, and pass rate (derived from normalized report.json).

execution_id.name: Execution ID
execution_id.description: Unique id for this test execution from the ingested report (execution_id). Primary external key for this summary row.

execution_name.name: Execution Name
execution_name.description: Display name of the execution from report execution_name (e.g. pipeline run or job label supplied by the publisher).

system_name.name: System Name
system_name.description: Name of the system under test from report system_under_test.name.

system_version.name: System Version
system_version.description: Version label for the system under test from report system_under_test.version (publisher-defined; may be semver, build id, or branch).

system_environment.name: System Environment
system_environment.description: Logical environment for the run from report system_under_test.environment (e.g. dev, staging, prod).

system_tags.name: System Tags
system_tags.description: JSON array string of tags from system_under_test.tags (e.g. branch, build metadata) for filtering and grouping.

aws_region.name: AWS Region
aws_region.description: AWS region for this execution record (default us-east-1 when the report does not specify a region; aligns with org-level reporting).

execution_type.name: Execution Type
execution_type.description: Kind of execution from execution_metrics.type (e.g. ci, scheduled); semantics depend on the report publisher.

cases_type.name: Cases Type
cases_type.description: Category or grouping of cases in this execution (e.g. unit, e2e, integration). Reserved for future inference from report paths or metadata; empty when not set.

framework_name.name: Framework Name
framework_name.description: Test framework name from execution_metrics.framework.name when present in the report.

framework_version.name: Framework Version
framework_version.description: Framework or runtime hint from execution_metrics.framework.version when present (publisher-defined).

duration_seconds.name: Duration (seconds)
duration_seconds.description: Total execution duration in seconds from execution_metrics.duration.

total_cases.name: Total Cases
total_cases.description: Total number of test cases in summary.total (passed, failed, and skipped combined).

passed_cases.name: Passed Cases
passed_cases.description: Number of test cases that completed successfully from summary.passed.

failed_cases.name: Failed Cases
failed_cases.description: Number of test cases that failed from summary.failed.

skipped_cases.name: Skipped Cases
skipped_cases.description: Number of test cases skipped from summary.skipped.

source_path.name: Source Path
source_path.description: Stable identifier for this report in the snap-in: set to execution_id (S3 object path may be tracked separately in extraction metadata).

pass_percent.name: Pass Percent
pass_percent.description: Percentage of cases that passed: passed divided by total (one decimal; 0.0 when total is zero).

execution_percent.name: Execution Percent
execution_percent.description: Percentage of cases that were executed (not skipped): (total minus skipped) divided by total. Measures how much of the suite actually ran.

pipeline_status.name: Pipeline Status
pipeline_status.description: Aggregate pass/fail for this execution: failed when summary.failed is greater than zero, otherwise passed.
